code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  nums
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x < v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < a.len()
  match a.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    if list.contains(b, v) and not list.contains(result, v)
      result = insert_sorted(result, v)
    end
  when None
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if result.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < result.len()
    match result.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
